summary: CI fix for PR #205: root CI ran pnpm test and exposed a stale SSR assertion in tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx that still expected the old Reachable route / Blocked route legend labels. The fix updates that test to the M7 situation-map legend semantics already implemented and reviewed: Situation mode button, Route / supply, Obligation / tributary flow, Threat / risk, Blocked / capacity, and matching legend tones.

tests_run.result: PASS; architecture, determinism, root Vitest 43 files / 353 tests, and web 9 tests passed.
PASS; format, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.
PASS; existing Vite chunk-size warning only.

decisions: No product code was changed in this CI fix; only stale SSR expectations were updated to match the accepted legend semantics.
PR #205 should be updated and CI rerun before merge.
requested_action: Push CI fix to PR #205, wait for CI, then merge and close the task after main synchronization.
